flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Limestone University fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (27.3% → 22.6%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Limestone University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Limestone University fell 100% between 2020 and 2023 (10.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Limestone University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (29.7% → 35.3%).
